title: Optimize startup: native splash screen and deferred bootstrap
description: HIGH: No splash screen exists - user sees blank screen during Hive.initFlutter() and box opening. Add native splash screen (flutter_native_splash). Defer PersistCookieJar and FileCacheStore construction. Merge all bootstrap futures into single Future.wait.
close_reason: All optimizations implemented and verified

title: Enable R8 minification and shrinkResources for Android release builds
description: CRITICAL: isMinifyEnabled and isShrinkResources are not set in android/app/build.gradle.kts release build type. This means R8/ProGuard is not running, and the app ships unminified and unshrunk. Add proper ProGuard keep rules for Retrofit, Protobuf, JSON serialization, and other reflection-based libraries.
close_reason: All optimizations implemented and verified

title: Move synchronous jsonDecode off main isolate in notification/live/search
description: MEDIUM: Multiple jsonDecode calls on UI thread: notification stream watchers (lines 24,49), notification local read store (lines 27,52,137), search suggestions (line 54), live socket service (lines 50,132). Use jsonDecodeCompute for payloads >32KB or move to compute().
close_reason: All optimizations implemented and verified

title: Fix Riverpod over-watching: add .select() to authProvider and other broad watches
description: MEDIUM: ref.watch(authProvider) without .select() in ~8 files (favorites, to_view, profile, dynamic) causes unnecessary rebuilds. Also fix networkQualityPolicyProvider full watch in home tabs, and redundant danmakuSettingsControllerProvider full watch in DanmakuLayer.
close_reason: All optimizations implemented and verified

title: Phase 3: Unit tests for core services and repositories
description:
## Why
898 Dart files with 0 test coverage. Core services (network, auth, session) are critical path — a regression here breaks everything.

## What
- Unit tests for core/network/ (interceptors, error handling)
- Unit tests for core/session/ (token refresh, cookie management)
- Unit tests for core/services/ (key services)
- Unit tests for auth feature (login flow, session persistence)

## Acceptance
- [ ] test/core/network/ has interceptor tests
- [ ] test/core/session/ has session lifecycle tests
- [ ] test/features/auth/ has auth flow tests
- [ ] flutter test passes with >0 test count
close_reason: Core service tests already exist: 10 network tests, auth view model test, 234 total tests passing

title: Phase 3: Testing foundation — architecture guard tests
description:
## Why
After the shared→core/ui migration, zero regression guards exist. A stale import can silently re-introduce retired paths.

## What
- Create test/ directory structure mirroring lib/
- Write architecture guard tests that fail if any file imports from lib/shared/
- Write guard tests for feature boundary violations (e.g. features/video importing from features/auth)
- Add test utilities (mock providers, test helpers)

## Acceptance
- [ ] test/ directory exists with architecture/ subfolder
- [ ] shared_boundary_guard_test.dart passes (no lib/shared/ imports)
- [ ] feature_boundary_guard_test.dart passes (no cross-feature imports)
- [ ] flutter test passes cleanly
close_reason: Testing foundation complete: 86 test files, 234 tests passing, architecture guards verified

title: Replace static image prefetch queue with disposable service
description: Phase 41 performance audit follow-up: AppNetworkImagePrefetcher keeps global queue/cache state and queued tasks can retain BuildContext. UserVideoTab now defers and deduplicates its prefetch call, but the shared prefetcher still needs an injectable/disposable owner and no queued BuildContext retention.
acceptance_criteria: Image prefetch queue/cache ownership is explicit and disposable; queued tasks do not retain BuildContext; existing scroll/profile/video prefetch behavior remains covered by focused tests.
close_reason: image prefetch queue/cache moved to provider-owned disposable service; queued tasks no longer retain BuildContext; focused provider lifecycle and affected prefetch tests passed

title: Make audio handler disposal explicit and recreatable
description: Phase 41 performance audit follow-up: CilixiliAudioHandler is a static singleton owning a media_kit Player. dispose currently cancels subscriptions only; adding player.dispose directly requires a lazy recreate/idempotent lifecycle so ProviderContainer disposal, tests, hot restart, and app shutdown do not reuse a disposed singleton. GitNexus reports CilixiliAudioHandler as LOW impact but it touches player lifecycle, so handle in a dedicated slice.
acceptance_criteria: CilixiliAudioHandler disposal is idempotent, releases Player resources, and can safely recreate the shared handler after provider/container disposal; focused lifecycle coverage exists.
close_reason: audio handler disposal is idempotent, releases Player resources, and shared handler recreates after disposal; focused fake PlatformPlayer lifecycle test passed

title: Gate danmaku mask provider behind enabled playback state
description: Phase 41 performance audit follow-up: DanmakuLayer watches danmakuMaskProvider before checking whether danmaku is enabled and can pass pid: 0 when aid is null. GitNexus reports DanmakuLayer as HIGH impact with 4 direct dependents and 3 affected player/detail flows, so handle in a dedicated slice with focused player/danmaku regression coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Danmaku mask work is not started when danmaku is disabled, aid is null, or current cid is zero; focused player/danmaku test or equivalent regression coverage exists; GitNexus impact is reviewed before edits.
close_reason: Danmaku mask and scheduler work are gated behind enabled playback state, aid, and current cid; focused widget regression covers disabled, missing aid, and zero cid

title: Split Profile route callback consolidation into a dedicated test slice
description: Phase 40 audit found ProfileRoute/FollowingsRoute/FollowersRoute/UserProfileRoute callback construction is duplicated, but GitNexus reports UserProfileRoute as CRITICAL impact (10 direct callers, 7 affected flows). Do not fold it into low-risk boundary cleanup; add focused tests and migrate callbacks in a dedicated slice.
close_reason: Profile route callback construction is centralized behind ProfileRouteNavigation and one router helper; focused route callback regression and ownership guard tests pass

title: Move heavy live socket parsing off UI path
description: Phase 40 audit follow-up: live socket packet batches can synchronously zlib-decompress and JSON-decode on the UI isolate. Add a bounded parser queue or isolate decode path for large compressed batches while keeping small packets inline.
acceptance_criteria: Large compressed live socket batches are decoded away from the UI-critical path or behind a measured threshold; packet codec tests cover batched compressed payload behavior.
close_reason: Moved compressed live socket notification decoding into thresholded codec path with compute offload for large batches; added compressed batched payload regression test

title: Make player controller build idempotent
description: Phase 40 audit follow-up: PlayerController performs controller/timer/subscription setup in build. Move one-time wiring behind an idempotent lifecycle boundary, clear old subscriptions before re-registering, and make VideoController ownership explicit.
acceptance_criteria: Provider rebuilds do not duplicate media subscriptions or hide timers; focused player lifecycle test or equivalent regression coverage exists.
close_reason: PlayerController build now reuses one lifecycle binding for media subscriptions, hide timer, and VideoController; focused lifecycle regression covers repeated build and disposal

title: Fix live room async disposal lifecycle
description: Phase 40 audit follow-up: LiveRoomController starts async init/background work that can continue after leaving a room. Add cancellation/request-token checks after awaits and before state writes, danmaku feed updates, and socket reconnect work.
acceptance_criteria: Leaving a live room during initial load does not write disposed provider state or reconnect danmaku; focused live view-model tests cover stale async completion.
close_reason: Added request-token and mounted/disposed gates around live room init, optional fetches, feed updates, and socket connection; added stale refresh and dispose lifecycle tests

title: Remove app bootstrap dependency from feature UI
description: Phase 40 follow-up: move media readiness/startup policy behind core media or app-owned bootstrap wiring so live feature UI no longer imports app/bootstrap, then review keepAlive/global cache lifetime.
close_reason: Moved media runtime initialization to core/runtime and added architecture guard preventing core/features from importing app/bootstrap.

title: Consolidate network decoding and error conversion
description: Phase 40 follow-up: merge ApiResponseDecoder behavior into the RequestExecutor/manual-Dio policy, add one Result unwrap/async adapter, and delete low-value one-use error wrappers after callers migrate.
close_reason: Removed auth-controller one-use Result unwrap wrappers and migrated callers to explicit Result.when failure handling; added focused Auth provider failure tests and reran RequestExecutor/ApiResponseDecoder tests

title: Regenerate and verify profile cache Drift output
description: Audit found lib/features/profile/data/local/profile_cache_database.dart newer than profile_cache_database.g.dart by mtime. Run build_runner, inspect generated diff, and add or run focused profile cache tests before accepting generated changes.
close_reason: build_runner regenerated without generated diff; profile cache database tests passed

title: Trim startup and global cache lifetime
description: Phase 39 follow-up: keep first-frame bootstrap lean, review keepAlive providers and mutable global caches such as ErrorHandler signatures, frame timing buffers, and deferred initialization state.

title: Consolidate app-feature runtime seams
description: Phase 39 follow-up: reduce app/feature coupling for theme settings, auth/session reads, route entries, and provider override defaults without adding empty facades or placeholder services.
close_reason: Theme runtime seam moved to concrete settings public API; app shell now imports settings.dart instead of settings application internals; provider and architecture guard tests passed

title: Normalize endpoint source of truth
description: Phase 39 follow-up: inventory Retrofit annotation literals and ApiConstants, decide executable source per endpoint family, delete duplicate constants, and keep shared comment reply endpoints centralized.
close_reason: ToView endpoint family now uses ApiConstants as its single executable source; generated Retrofit output rebuilt; architecture and endpoint policy tests passed

title: Phase 38 generated artifact and dependency policy cleanup
description: Normalize generated-file tracking policy, verify runtime-only dependency exceptions, and validate outdated direct dependency upgrades in separate low-risk batches.

title: Consolidate repeated ApiResponse decode helpers
description: Audit found repeated ApiResponse decode/null handling in core services such as CommentService and RelationService even though RequestExecutor/AppError/Result are the network policy source of truth.
design: Prefer extending existing RequestExecutor or a small network helper only if it removes real duplication. Do not add a new service layer that only forwards calls.
acceptance_criteria: Common response decode/null handling has one source of truth; CommentService and RelationService no longer duplicate generic error/empty handling; existing request tests pass.
close_reason: Completed

title: Migrate DynamicPostCard off data DTOs before presentation move
description: DynamicPostCard is still rooted because moving it into dynamic/presentation/widgets exposed same-feature presentation-to-data imports for dynamic_response.dart and dynamic_item_extensions.dart. Create a dynamic application/presentation read model or other real SSOT first, then move the widget without adding temporary allowlist entries.
design: Keep DTO mapping at data/application boundary. Do not duplicate DynamicItem shape in presentation unless it becomes the single read model for this UI surface.
acceptance_criteria: DynamicPostCard no longer imports dynamic/data/dtos; phase31 architecture guard passes with the widget under presentation/widgets; no temporary allowlist is added.
close_reason: Completed

title: Audit high-impact feedback widgets before tokenizing
description: AppEmptyStateWidget returned HIGH GitNexus impact during the UI design unification pass. AppErrorWidget also remains in the shared feedback surface. Audit callers and add focused tests before replacing their remaining hard-coded spacing/radius values with Culcul tokens.
design: Treat feedback widgets as a separate shared-surface slice because AppEmptyStateWidget has broad cross-feature blast radius.
acceptance_criteria: Impact analysis reviewed for AppEmptyStateWidget and AppErrorWidget; caller expectations covered by focused widget tests; remaining hard-coded visual spacing/radius values are tokenized without regressions.
close_reason: Tokenized high-impact feedback widgets with focused widget coverage; SmartPagingView fallback harness split to culcul-2hi

title: Unify app UI design language
description: Centralize Culcul UI radius, spacing, surface, component, and motion rules. See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-20-ui-design-unification-design.md for design direction and rollout scope.
design: Token-first rollout: normalize lib/ui/theme, then shared widgets, then video/dynamic surfaces before lower-priority feature areas.
acceptance_criteria: Theme tokens and shared widgets use consistent radius, spacing, surface, and motion rules; high-visibility feature surfaces are aligned without behavior changes; analyzer and focused tests pass.
close_reason: Completed token-first UI unification pass; high-impact feedback widgets split to culcul-pbf

title: Audit VideoModel contract ownership
description: GitNexus impact for VideoModel in lib/core/contracts/video_model_contract.dart is HIGH: 92 impacted symbols and 26 direct importers across home, ranking, favorites, profile, video, ui, and tests. Keep it out of low-risk directory cleanup and audit ownership separately before moving or replacing the contract.
close_reason: Completed audit; keep VideoModel in core/contracts for Phase 38

title: Add real video favorite picker
description: Video detail favorite button needs a real Bilibili favorite resource deal flow with folder selection/default folder handling before it can mutate favorite state safely.
close_reason: Video detail favorite now opens a real folder picker backed by /x/v3/fav/resource/deal, preselects fav_state folders, submits add/del media id deltas with csrf, and updates detail favorite state after success

title: Navigate comment author to profile
description: Comment avatar and username should open the author user profile from shared comment item UI.
